value_chain_position: Vertically integrated uranium miner and processor supplying nuclear fuel to utilities globally — nuclear-fuel-and-services layer of the energy-transition value chain, a direct chokepoint for SMR and existing fleet fuel supply.
relative_comps: CCJ is the highest-quality publicly traded uranium toll-taker — tier-1 assets (Cigar Lake, McArthur River), 25% FCF margin and net-near-flat leverage set it apart from junior miners. NXE and UEC are development-stage with no comparable FCF; BWXT competes in nuclear services rather than fuel supply. The 23% 3-year CAGR reflects long-term contract re-pricing at structurally higher uranium spot prices. CCJ is the closest to an anchor example in the taxonomy for this sub-layer.
